chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-145 of 2019 Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh Case. 1. For order on office objection. 2. For orders on C.M.A. No. 583/19. 3. For orders on C.M.A. No. 584/19. 4. For hearing of main case. ------------------ 26.10.2021 None is present for the petitioner. Same was the position on last two dates of hearing. It appears that after filing this petition, the petitioner has lost its interest in pursuing the same; therefore, the instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution alongwith listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Athar Zai
